falsification_conditions.condition: The price of the asset rises above the 200-day moving average by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a strong bullish trend contradicting the 'bottom' pattern and invalidating the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by showing clear upward momentum.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 60 would confirm a blowoff top scenario, directly contradicting the 78% similarity to a bottom pattern and falsifying the current HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: A 10% surge in trading volume compared to the 30-day average occurs within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would indicate a major market shift (e.g., breakout or panic selling), invalidating the 'UNKNOWN' phase by proving a clear directional move.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
